plannedFamilies.name: elegy-memory-v1
plannedFamilies.releaseStory: Add a bounded local non-authoritative artifact-management family for import, list, show, export, supersede, and tombstone semantics without changing the existing summary-only-session-context-envelope or moving runtime authority out of SAASTools.
authorityReservations: SAASTools owns currentness
SAASTools owns approval
SAASTools owns freshness policy
SAASTools owns retrieval ranking
SAASTools owns runtime validation
SAASTools owns promotion authority

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-mcp-v1
plannedFamilies.releaseStory: Publish a dedicated MCP descriptor authoring and analysis CLI surface plus governed MCP skill fixtures without claiming unsupported REST or OpenAPI execution paths.
authorityReservations: contracts owns MCP descriptor and analysis artifact authority
governance owns release and compatibility metadata
downstream consumers own hosted runtime orchestration

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-skills-v1
plannedFamilies.releaseStory: Publish a dedicated governed skill-registry CLI surface plus governed skill fixtures while keeping autonomous authoring and host registration out of scope.
authorityReservations: contracts owns governed skill artifact authority
governance owns release and compatibility metadata
downstream consumers own runtime registration and orchestration

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-configuration-v1
plannedFamilies.releaseStory: Add a governed deterministic configuration family for materializing and verifying agentic assets such as skills, agents, hooks, MCP config, and bounded instruction overlays without absorbing host runtime registration or release download concerns.
authorityReservations: contracts owns configuration template/profile/receipt authority
rust/crates/elegy-configuration owns deterministic materialization behavior
downstream hosts own release download, auth, trust, approvals, and runtime registration

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-planning-v1
plannedFamilies.releaseStory: Publish a dedicated durable planning authority surface for scoped lifecycle transitions, revision, validation, and projection export without moving host-local policy or side-effect ownership into Elegy.
authorityReservations: contracts own planning skill and result artifact authority
rust/crates/elegy-planning owns durable planning state and projection behavior
downstream hosts own local policy, approval, and side-effect gating

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-documentation-v1
plannedFamilies.releaseStory: Publish a dedicated authority-aware documentation surface for inspecting, mapping, objectively checking, and non-authoritatively exporting repo-local documentation without moving documentation truth out of source documents.
authorityReservations: contracts own documentation config and result schema authority
rust/crates/elegy-documentation owns deterministic docs inspection behavior
source documents remain authoritative over generated exports

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-generator-v0
plannedFamilies.releaseStory: Add a contracts-first generator foundation for deterministic solved-unit manifests, validation checks, loose registries, receipts, and dry-run planning without shipping a file-emitting backend.
authorityReservations: contracts own generator schema and fixture authority
rust/crates/elegy-tooling owns reusable dry-run validation behavior
future domain tracks own concrete generator contract shapes and backends
downstream hosts own approval, policy, runtime execution, and side-effect gating

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-obsidian-v1
plannedFamilies.releaseStory: Publish a thin skill that wraps the official Obsidian v1.12+ CLI for vault-aware note operations as a non-authoritative foundation for the future elegy-planning obsidian mirror/attach/resolve/list surface.
authorityReservations: contracts own the governed skill definition and the obsidian-result envelope schema
the user's installed Obsidian Desktop provides the executable; the wrapper does not ship or own a binary
elegy-planning and SQLite remain the durable planning authority; Obsidian is a non-canonical vault mirror

policy.bundleMajor: Increment for breaking changes to the published governed bundle or compatibility contract.
policy.schemaMajor: Increment for breaking schema changes. Requires a bundle major version bump in governance/version-policy.json.
policy.schemaPatch: Increment for backward-compatible schema corrections or metadata fixes.
